desc:
Savage Divide Treasure Map #3 dig site: Go to the cable car at Top of the World and follow the cable car down. At the point where a path crosses the cable car (here is also a signpost), you jump over the fence and go the slope down. There’s a crashed cable car, in front of which you can find the treasure (near the cable car support pillar).
Grid F6 (X: 2276.1, Y: 2243.6)
Submitted By MrCrazy
